\tzpentry{ID3847}{Be Gauge Potential Spacetime ChernSimons Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3847 introduces Be Gauge Potential Spacetime ChernSimons Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(A\) be a gauge potential on spacetime. The Chern–Simons functional is \[ S_{\text{CS}}[A] = \frac{k_{\text{CS}}}{4\pi}\int_{\mathbb{R}^3\times\mathbb{R}} \Bigl(A\wedge \mathrm{d}A + \tfrac{2}{3} A\wedge A\wedge A\Bigr). \] The level \(k_{\text{CS}}\)
\]
